title: Eroc65/auto-gpt
summary: Auto-GPT 是一个实验性的开源框架，将大型语言模型如 GPT 转换为能够自我导向推理、递归目标执行和动态工具使用的自主代理。该框架利用模型推理、算法架构和性能优化，适用于需要智能交互和自动化处理的场景。
description: Auto-GPT is an experimental open-source framework that transforms large language models like GPT into autonomous agents capable of self-directed reasoning, recursive goal execution, and dynamic tool use. Unlike traditional chat interfaces
